title: Minecraft Dungeons Pets
description: A resourcepack that adds most of Minecraft Dungeons' Pets to the base game.
body:
![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/067cd4b0a9d27da9b6c5cff37acba5868bd2018a.png)

As you might know, if you've played Minecraft Dungeons, The game features a wide arrangement of [Pets (Wiki Page)](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Pet_(cosmetic)) you can unlock.

With this resourcepack I plan to add most of those to the base game.

I'll detail how to find these variants below (all these changes can be forced by renaming the mob to the right name. IE. "Red Panda")

Lets start with the retextures (and small remodels) of Vanilla mobs:
<details>
<summary>Cow Variants</summary>
**IMPORTANT NOTICE: I've already posted a standalone resourcepack, that adds these variants (and more) to the game. To use That resourcepack (or any other that changes cows) in combination with this one, you must give it prioity over this pack. **

You van find the cows in the following biomes:
The Dairy cow has a 1 in 4 chance of spawning in place of a cow, in any biome.

![Dairy Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75795a4f65c7863a79afaeab2cccfa4636c812df.png)

The Wooly Cow spawns in all cold/frozen biomes.

![Wooly Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6d3cdef1121b3a5e3cf1f1a427c6fdd00fd81b4.png)

The Moobloom spawns in Flower Forests, Meadows, and Sunflower Fields.

![Moobloom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54a6852451a5c37264a82b8e4f226f8a191506e.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Pig Variants</summary>
The Spotted- and Zombified pig have a 1 in 4 and 1 in 1000 chance respectively, to spawn in any biome.

![Spotted Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e39f6605b09621053522fa710d24dd882fb51adb.png)

![Zombified pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b69cee57aafa0f46a082de77e7aea7dbd75e4422.png)

The Piebald Pig spawns is all Savanna, Desert and Badland Biomes.

![Piebald Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/698d22f3710c4ea960b01475742955691b30c108.png)

The Sooty Pig spawns in all cold/frozen biomes.

![Sooty Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db74e1b4ec26a9706a32080ebbef28a24c49923c.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Chicken Variants</summary>
The Fancy Chicken has a 1 in 5 chance of spawning instead of a regulair chicken.

![Fancy Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea4fef04da3aa2d07f3928a01e3151af291ba459.png)

The Duck spawns in all River, Swamp and Beach biomes.

![Duck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e51b3325a15721c942da9164a33157070bcd321.png)

The Cluckshroom spawns in Mushroom Fields.

![Cluckshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a4f3d5f9f3df4c4145de878f888980f35ab7389.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Remaining retextures of Vanilla mobs</summary>
The Ruby Turtle has a 1 in 10 chance of spawning instead of regular Turtles.

![Ruby Turtle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7811e6f926b1ccdbfe56e39f53f3f5dcda1b7868.png)

The Phantom Familiar has a 1 in 10 chance of spawning instead of regular Phantoms.

![Phantom Familiar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6e94dbfff8ee28485b4116443d14fb1e7d9245.png)

The Blue Endermite has a 1 in 5 chance of spawning instead of a regular Endermite.

![Blue Endermite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/966861e18b1f4ddeab8adffd148e314b0fa79d93.png)

The Dark Goat has a 1 in 10 chance of spawning instead of regular Goat.

![Dark Goat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b940aff011bc034c7ee80b6d0415aa1af4ab25b.png)

The Golden Parrot has a 1 in 100 chance of spawning instead of a regular Parrot.

![Golden parrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ac4a189d422c782daf8d17b2073249dff86b25.png)

</details>

And now for the more complex edits:
<details>
<summary>Red Panda, Skunk and Raccoon</summary>
The Skunk and Racoon both have a 50/50 chance of spawning in Forests, Birch Forests and Flower Forests instead of Foxes.

![Skunk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19386dad10a897b8476f08956e04b661f71f00a.png)

![Raccoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d96ddc08612f34ea91dad3e4e851d1caf389e3a.png)

The Red Panda spawns instead of Foxes in Cherry Groves and all Jungle Biomes.

![Red Panda](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32fef645dcae22c1c95d7a068d32d42b2abfcace.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ferrets</summary>
The Cinnamon Ferret spawns instead of an Ocelot in all Savanna and Badland Biomes.

![Cinnamon ferret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a378e0b52748a1a5880dbbcb63cd9b9ee8a7726f.png)

The Sable Ferret spawns instead of an Ocelot  in Forests, Flower Forests and Birch Forests.

![Sable Ferret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4f377b82bf51377e4d07b75b517d652b2c761f.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Baby Squid & Baby Ghast</summary>
Both spawn in all Ocean biomes instead of an Allay, with The Baby Ghast having a 1 in 50 chance of spawning instead of Baby Squids.

![Baby Squid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/547ddf7becb1c8911d83d7eadbbe6b44f7955b88.png)

![Baby Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7843c3b5010de3d3e6da55313dc97f53ade0c4c.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ministrosities & Mini Abominations</summary>
All of these spawn instead of wolves.
  
The Stone and Redstone Ministrosity spawn between Y-Level 56 and 1, with the Redstone Ministrosity having a 1 in 4 chance to spawn.

![Stone Ministrosity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e696de7fa6fd6aa08fe2ec59db5e696175b39859.png)

![Redstone Ministrosity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a893066579268061de5fc47c2405424bbe622f0d.png)

The Glowing Ministrosity spawns from Y-Level 0 and below.

![Glowing Ministrosity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e2a6807114bc42f16698548cc20902122e7a56e.png)

The Glowing and regular Mini Abomination, spawn in all Jungle biomes, with a 50/50 chance.

![Mini Abomination](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccaf5aa67fb09f31716f9a91c98a2862491ea486.png)

![Glowing Mini Abomination](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/facb97b588b0ab1146d7a4973a3eca84e7f87743.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Raven & Toucan</summary>
The raven spawns instead of parrots in Forests, Flower Forests, Birch Forests and Plains biomes.

![Raven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/133d3bf20f5b7d7acfb2db86abbfbd7f997162d6.png)

The Toucan has a slightly higher than 1 in 6 chance of spawning in all Jungle Biomes.

![Toucan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4ee066c079a347de2b707ed4ce31dd38c76fd4.png)

</details>

Only the followign Pets are missing form this resourcepack: Hedgehog, Mole and both Penguins. This is because I can't for the life of me think of what mob they should replace. When I think of something fitting, I'll update the resourcepack. But I wouldn't hold my breath.
